fixtures.locksIn: Receipts/checkpoints and tiny endangered items rank ahead of bulk cargo in blink encounters.
Short encounters drain high-value messages before larger attachments.
Durable encounters allocate cargo budget while preserving control traffic priority.
Exact same-tier ties resolve through canonical tie-break chain down to itemID.
Low-replication transit can outrank direct-only metadata due to immutable tier precedence.
Large media is deferred under short encounter budgets unless durable budgets permit it.
Tier 0 receipt/checkpoint traffic remains protected even when higher tiers score higher numerically.
Canonical deterministic outputs remain byte-for-byte stable across repeated runs.
